Package edu.psu.hurtak

Class Character

java.lang.Object
edu.psu.hurtak.Character
Direct Known Subclasses:
Enemy, Player
public abstract class Character extends Object
Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss. Course: IST 242 Author(s): Alexander Matthew Hurtak, Martin Edwin Naugle, Arbi Xepha, Avery Paige Timm Date Developed: 06/23/2026 Last Date Changed: 06/25/2026 Rev: 1
